title: Register with valid email and password redirects to Confirm Email page
description: Verifies a new user can submit the registration form successfully and is redirected to the email confirmation page.

steps.description: Type "newuser+e2e1@example.com" into the email input field
Type "ValidPassw0rd!" into the password input field

title: Register with invalid email shows validation error and stays on Register page
description: Verifies invalid email format is rejected with visible validation errors and no redirect occurs.

steps.description: Type "not-an-email" into the email input field
Type "ValidPassw0rd!" into the password input field

title: Register with empty email shows required-field validation and stays on Register page
description: Verifies the email field is required and the form cannot be submitted with email left blank.

steps.description: Type "ValidPassw0rd!" into the password input field

title: Register with empty password shows required-field validation and stays on Register page
description: Verifies the password field is required and the form cannot be submitted with password left blank.

steps.description: Type "newuser+e2e2@example.com" into the email input field

title: Register with very short password shows validation error and stays on Register page
description: Verifies password length/strength validation triggers a visible error and prevents submission.

steps.description: Type "newuser+e2e3@example.com" into the email input field
Type "123" into the password input field

title: Register with already-used email shows error and stays on Register page
description: Verifies attempting to register with an existing email shows a visible error message and does not redirect.

steps.description: Type "existing.user@example.com" into the email input field
Type "ValidPassw0rd!" into the password input field

title: Confirm Email page can be reached directly and shows confirmation guidance
description: Verifies the confirm email page renders and provides visible instructions after registration.

title: Email/password login redirects to dashboard
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid email/password and is redirected to the dashboard.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email input field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password input field
Click the Login button to submit

title: Invalid password shows error and stays on login
description: Verifies an incorrect password shows an invalid-credentials error and the user remains on the login page.

steps.description: Type "valid.user@example.com" into the email input field
Type "wrong-password" into the password input field
Click the Login button to submit

title: Empty submit shows required field validation
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission and shows validation when required fields are empty.

steps.description: Click the Login button to submit

title: Password-only submit shows email required validation
description: Verifies submitting with only a password shows an email validation message and stays on the login page.

steps.description: Type "some-password" into the password input field
Click the Login button to submit

title: Email-only submit shows password required validation
description: Verifies submitting with only an email shows a password validation message and stays on the login page.

steps.description: Type "valid.user@example.com" into the email input field
Click the Login button to submit

title: Invalid email format is rejected on the login form
description: Verifies the email field validates format and prevents login submission when the email is malformed.

steps.description: Type "not-an-email" into the email input field
Type "some-password" into the password input field
Click the Login button to submit

title: Request password reset with a registered email shows success feedback
description: Verifies a user can request a password reset email and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email input field
Click the send reset link button
Verify text indicating an email was sent is visible
Verify text "Check your email" is visible

title: Request password reset with an unknown email shows error feedback
description: Verifies the form shows an error when a non-existent email is submitted.

steps.description: Type "nonexistent.user.987654@example.com" into the email input field
Click the send reset link button
Verify text indicating the request failed or email was not found is visible
Verify the email input field is visible

title: Submitting with an empty email shows validation feedback
description: Verifies the reset form prevents submission and displays validation when email is missing.

steps.description: Click the send reset link button
Verify text indicating email is required is visible
Verify the email input field is visible

title: Submitting with an invalid email format shows validation feedback
description: Verifies the reset form validates email format and shows an error for malformed input.

steps.description: Type "not-an-email" into the email input field
Click the send reset link button
Verify text indicating a valid email is required is visible
Verify the email input field is visible

title: Resubmitting after an error with a valid email shows success feedback
description: Verifies a user can correct an invalid submission and successfully request a reset email afterward.

steps.description: Type "bad" into the email input field
Click the send reset link button
Verify text indicating a valid email is required is visible
Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email input field
Click the send reset link button
Verify text indicating an email was sent is visible

title: Trimming behavior: email with leading/trailing spaces can be submitted successfully
description: Verifies the form handles common user input of emails with extra spaces and still provides success feedback.

steps.description: Type "  {{LOGIN_USER}}  " into the email input field
Click the send reset link button
Verify text indicating an email was sent is visible
Verify text "Check your email" is visible

title: Dashboard shows key metric cards and recent QR codes list for authenticated user
description: Verifies the dashboard overview loads and displays the four key metric cards and a recent QR codes list.

steps.description: Verify text "Total QR codes" is visible
Verify text "Active QR codes" is visible

title: Dashboard displays Total QR codes metric value
description: Verifies the Total QR codes metric card shows a visible numeric value on the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify text "Total QR codes" is visible
Verify element "Total QR codes metric value" is visible

title: Dashboard displays Active QR codes metric value
description: Verifies the Active QR codes metric card shows a visible numeric value on the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify text "Active QR codes" is visible
Verify element "Active QR codes metric value" is visible

title: Dashboard displays Today's scans metric value
description: Verifies the Today’s scan count metric card appears with a visible value.

steps.description: Verify element "Today's scan count metric value" is visible

title: Dashboard displays Monthly scans metric value
description: Verifies the monthly scan count metric card appears with a visible value.

steps.description: Verify element "Monthly scan count metric value" is visible

title: Dashboard shows a recent QR codes section with at least the list container visible
description: Verifies the recent QR codes section renders on the dashboard and is visible to the user.

steps.description: Verify text "Recent QR codes" is visible
Verify element "Recent QR codes list" is visible

title: Dashboard metric cards remain visible after a page refresh
description: Verifies dashboard overview metrics remain visible after refreshing the page (session persists).

steps.description: Press "Enter" key to refresh the page
Verify text "Total QR codes" is visible
Verify text "Active QR codes" is visible

title: QR list loads and pagination controls are visible
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the QR list and see list and pagination UI.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation

title: Create a basic URL QR code successfully
description: Verifies a user can create a new URL QR code with required fields and is taken to the QR detail page.

steps.description: Click the "QR Codes" link in the dashboard navigation

title: Required-field validation prevents saving when fields are missing
description: Verifies the form blocks creation and shows visible validation feedback when required fields are not provided.

steps.description: Click the "QR Codes" link in the dashboard navigation

title: Live preview updates when changing type and content
description: Verifies the QR preview changes in real time when the user selects a type and enters content.

steps.description: Click the "QR Codes" link in the dashboard navigation
Fill "My Preview Test" into the QR name field
Fill "https://example.com" into the QR content/data field

title: Customize colors and styles and see preview reflect changes
description: Verifies color and style customization controls can be used and the preview remains visible after changes.

steps.description: Click the "QR Codes" link in the dashboard navigation
Fill "Styled QR" into the QR name field
Fill "https://example.com/styled" into the QR content/data field

title: Enable gradient and configure gradient colors
description: Verifies the gradient toggle can be enabled and gradient configuration is shown/applied with the preview visible.

steps.description: Click the "QR Codes" link in the dashboard navigation
Fill "Gradient QR" into the QR name field
Fill "https://example.com/gradient" into the QR content/data field

title: Set password protection and verify the setting is accepted before save
description: Verifies the password protection control can be enabled and a password can be entered without blocking the form.

steps.description: Click the "QR Codes" link in the dashboard navigation
Fill "Protected QR" into the QR name field
Fill "https://example.com/protected" into the QR content/data field

title: Set expiration date and max scan limit and save successfully
description: Verifies optional expiration and scan limit fields can be set and the QR can still be created successfully.

steps.description: Click the "QR Codes" link in the dashboard navigation
Fill "Limited QR" into the QR name field
Fill "https://example.com/limited" into the QR content/data field

title: Plan limit enforcement shows error and routes user to billing
description: Verifies that when creation exceeds plan limits, a visible error is shown and the user can proceed to billing.

steps.description: Click the "QR Codes" link in the dashboard navigation
Fill "Over Limit QR" into the QR name field
Fill "https://example.com/over-limit" into the QR content/data field
Click the "Billing" button or link shown in the error message

title: Edit QR Code: Save valid edits and return to QR detail
description: Verifies a user can edit an existing QR code and save successfully, seeing a success message and leaving the edit page.

steps.description: Verify element "QR code form" is visible

title: Edit QR Code: Cancel discards changes and leaves edit flow
description: Verifies cancel action is available and discards edits by leaving the edit form without showing a success toast.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "QR codes list" is visible

title: Edit QR Code: Validation errors shown for invalid inputs on save
description: Verifies that attempting to save invalid edits shows field-level validation errors and the user remains in the edit context.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "QR codes list" is visible

title: Per-QR analytics page shows core metrics and visualizations (non-Pro safe checks)
description: Verifies that the per-QR analytics page renders key analytics sections including metrics, charts, and recent scans table.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation

title: Per-QR analytics page displays Total Scans and Unique Visitors metrics
description: Validates that key metric tiles (Total Scans and Unique Visitors) are visible on a per-QR analytics view.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation

title: Per-QR analytics page shows scan trend area chart section
description: Ensures the scan trend (over time) visualization section is present and visible to the user.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation

title: Per-QR analytics page shows device/browser/OS distribution donut charts
description: Checks that distribution chart sections for device, browser, and OS are visible on the analytics page.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation

title: Per-QR analytics page shows recent scans table with device and location columns
description: Verifies the recent scans table renders and includes device and location information columns/labels.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation

title: Free-plan user sees upgrade-required messaging when attempting world map analytics (if present)
description: Confirms that attempting to access the world map visualization prompts an upgrade-required message and provides a path to billing.

steps.description: Click on "Analytics" in the dashboard navigation

title: Upgrade flow from upgrade-required prompt navigates to Billing page
description: Validates that the upgrade-required prompt provides navigation to the billing management page.

steps.description: Click on "Analytics" in the dashboard navigation

title: Export controls are visible only when allowed (no download verification)
description: Checks that export UI is either present (for eligible users) or absent/disabled (for non-eligible users) without attempting a file download.

steps.description: Click on "Analytics" in the dashboard navigation

title: Global Analytics renders key aggregate metrics and charts for an authenticated user
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the Global Analytics Dashboard and see the main metric cards and charts.

steps.description: Click on "Analytics" in the dashboard navigation

title: Global Analytics shows conversion rate radial gauge and scan trends time-series chart
description: Verifies that the conversion rate gauge and time-series scan trends chart are visible on the analytics page.

steps.description: Click on "Analytics" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "conversion rate radial gauge" is visible
Verify element "scan trends time-series chart" is visible

title: Global Analytics shows country list with scan counts
description: Verifies that the country list section is visible and presents scan counts by country.

steps.description: Click on "Analytics" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "country list with scan counts" is visible

title: World map is shown for Pro users (feature-gated content)
description: Verifies that the world map chart section is available when the account has access to Pro analytics features.

steps.description: Click on "Analytics" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "world map with scan density by country" is visible
Verify element "map legend or country density visualization" is visible

title: World map is not available for Free users (Pro-only limitation respected)
description: Verifies that Free plan users do not see the Pro-only world map chart on the Global Analytics Dashboard.

steps.description: Click on "Analytics" in the dashboard navigation
Verify text "World map" is not visible
Verify element "world map with scan density by country" is not visible
Verify element "country list with scan counts" is visible

title: Analytics page remains usable when data takes time to load
description: Verifies that the page shows a visible loading state and then displays metrics/charts once loaded.

steps.description: Click on "Analytics" in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "analytics loading indicator" is visible
Wait for element "Total scans metric card" to appear

title: Non-existent QR slug redirects to QR Not Found page
description: Verifies that scanning an unknown QR slug results in a user-facing not-found destination.

title: Expired QR redirects to QR Expired page
description: Verifies that scanning an expired QR code sends the user to the expired error page.

title: Inactive QR redirects to QR Inactive page
description: Verifies that scanning an inactive QR code sends the user to the inactive error page.

title: Scan-limit-reached QR redirects to QR Limit page
description: Verifies that scanning a QR code that exceeded its scan limit sends the user to the limit error page.

title: Navigating to inactive/expired/limit error pages shows expected messaging (non-gate paths)
description: Verifies the public error pages render correctly for protected content states outside the gate.

title: Create a new folder from QR list and see it in the folders sidebar
description: Verifies a user can create a folder from the QR list page and the new folder appears in the folder list.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation
Click create folder button to open modal
Fill "Test Folder A" into the folder name field in the modal
Verify text "Test Folder A" is visible

title: Create folder then open it from sidebar (route transition occurs)
description: Verifies a user can create a folder and then click it to navigate to that folder's QR list page.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation
Click create folder button to open modal
Fill "Test Folder B" into the folder name field in the modal
Click folder to view its QR codes

title: Prevent creating a folder with a duplicate name
description: Verifies duplicate folder names are blocked with a visible validation error and the modal stays open.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation
Click create folder button to open modal
Fill "Duplicate Folder" into the folder name field in the modal
Click create folder button to open modal
Fill "Duplicate Folder" into the folder name field in the modal

title: Rename an existing folder from the folders sidebar actions
description: Verifies a user can rename a folder and the updated name is visible in the folders list.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation
Click create folder button to open modal
Fill "Rename Me" into the folder name field in the modal
Fill "Renamed Folder" into the folder name field

title: Delete an existing folder from the folders sidebar actions
description: Verifies a user can delete a folder and it no longer appears in the folders list.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation
Click create folder button to open modal
Fill "Delete Me" into the folder name field in the modal
Verify text "Delete Me" is not visible

title: Validate folder name is required when creating a folder
description: Verifies the create folder modal shows a required-field validation when submitting an empty folder name.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation
Click create folder button to open modal

title: Move a QR code into a folder via the folder selector modal
description: Verifies a user can assign an existing QR code to a folder using the move-to-folder selector flow.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the dashboard navigation
Click create folder button to open modal
Fill "Move Target" into the folder name field in the modal
Click on the first QR code in the list
Move QR code to a folder via selector modal
Select "Move Target" from the folder dropdown

title: Billing page shows current plan details for a logged-in user
description: Verifies that the billing page loads after login and displays the user's current subscription plan details.

steps.description: Click on "Billing" in the dashboard navigation

title: Billing page shows available plans (Free, Pro, Business)
description: Verifies that the billing page lists the available subscription plans for upgrade comparison.

steps.description: Click on "Billing" in the dashboard navigation

title: Billing page loads and key actions are visible (Upgrade and Manage subscription)
description: Verifies that the billing page presents the expected primary actions to the user.

steps.description: Click on "Billing" in the dashboard navigation

title: View profile details on the Profile page
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the Profile page and see their current name and email.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the dashboard navigation

title: Update profile name successfully and see confirmation toast
description: Verifies that a user can change their profile name and receives a visible success toast after saving.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the dashboard navigation
Fill "Test User Updated" into the name field

title: Invalid profile name shows error toast and user remains on Profile page
description: Verifies that submitting an invalid name results in an error toast and no navigation away from the Profile page.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the dashboard navigation

title: Profile email is visible and not edited via the name update flow
description: Verifies the email value is shown on the Profile page and stays visible after a name-only save attempt.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the dashboard navigation
Fill "Test User Name Only" into the name field

title: Submitting an empty name is rejected and shows an error toast
description: Verifies that clearing the name field and attempting to save shows an error toast and keeps the user on the Profile page.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the dashboard navigation

title: Profile update feedback appears after clicking Save
description: Verifies that clicking Save produces visible feedback (success or error toast) to the user.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the dashboard navigation
Fill "Test User Feedback" into the name field

title: Add a QR code to Favorites from the QR list and confirm it appears in Favorites
description: Verifies a user can favorite a QR from the QR list and see it listed on the Favorites page.

steps.description: Click on "QRs" in the dashboard navigation
Click the favorite (heart/star) icon on the first QR code in the list
Click on "Favorites" in the dashboard navigation
Verify at least one QR code item is visible in the favorites list

description: Verifies the theme toggle switches the UI to dark mode on the Dashboard.

Click theme toggle button in header/sidebar

description: Verifies the theme toggle switches the UI back to light mode after enabling dark mode.

Click theme toggle button in header/sidebar
Click theme toggle button in header/sidebar

title: Theme toggle does not navigate away or change route
description: Verifies clicking the theme toggle does not trigger a page navigation away from the Dashboard route.

Click theme toggle button in header/sidebar

description: Verifies the toggle remains responsive and the UI reflects the final selected theme after repeated toggles.
